root_cause: Account-level Lambda concurrent execution limit (1000) reached
error_message: Rate Exceeded: Lambda concurrent execution limit exceeded
evidence: Other functions throttled due to limit
resolution: Set reserved concurrency for critical functions and requested limit increase
fix_commands: aws support create-case --subject 'Request Lambda concurrent execution limit increase' --service-code lambda --category-code general-guidance
preventive_measures: Set reserved concurrency for critical functions
Implement queue-based processing for high-volume workloads
